title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building the wrapper and orchestration layer around AI coding agents, comprising an AI layer for single sessions (rules, skills, hooks, subagents) and a second layer for orchestrating multiple agent sessions into focused workflows. The harness comprises roughly 98% of a coding agent system like Claude Code, making it the primary lever for scaling agent reliability.
